summary: P0-01 Health Stabilization Testing Complete. All health endpoints contract verified: /api/health/db always returns HTTP 200 (never 503), migration_required handled as separate signal via /api/health/migrations. Main agent's 15min loop test (900 requests) confirmed count_503=0. Concurrency stress test (20 workers x 50 requests = 1000 total) all returned HTTP 200 with no 503 errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Health stabilization verified. /api/health/db always returns HTTP 200 with status=ok|degraded, db_status=ok|fail. Migration state tracked separately via /api/health/migrations endpoint. 500ms timeout configured. Cache TTL 30s for DB probe. 15min and 24h monitoring in progress show count_503=0.

HEALTH_DB_CONTRACT.reason_field: PASS - reason field present when degraded (migration_required, db_timeout, db_unreachable)
HEALTH_DB_CONTRACT.response_structure: PASS - All required fields present (status, database, db_status, migration_state, db_timeout_ms)

HEALTH_MIGRATIONS_ENDPOINT.migration_required_flag: PASS - migration_required is boolean or null

CONCURRENCY_STRESS_TEST.20_workers_1000_requests: PASS - 1000 requests with 20 workers x 50 each, all HTTP 200
